summary: Iteration 14: Tested Customer Portal (public tracking), Audit Scheduling, Document Management, and Contact History features. Backend APIs: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI: All tested features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: DocumentManagement component exists but is not integrated into any page/route. It's a standalone component that could be added to the UI
design_issues.priority: LOW - Feature ready but not exposed in UI

action_items: OPTIONAL: Integrate DocumentManagementPage component into a page route (e.g., /documents) or embed it within existing pages like form details or contract details
critical_code_review_comments: Customer Portal tracking API properly returns timeline with status progression
Contact History properly links to customer via customer_id (form or proposal)
Audit Scheduling properly validates contract_id points to agreement_signed proposals
Document Management API stores files as base64 in MongoDB - works but may need optimization for large files
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features (Customer Portal, Audit Scheduling, Contact History, Document Management) have working backend APIs. UI is working for Customer Portal, Audit Scheduling, and Contact History. DocumentManagement component exists but needs to be integrated into a route/page.

findings: Timeline displays correctly with status progression
Error handling shows proper message for invalid IDs
Company name, contact info, standards, dates all display correctly
Calendar view working with Arabic day names
List view showing audits with details
Create modal with all required fields
Contact list displays with type icons (call, email, meeting)
Create contact modal with all fields
Not integrated into any page route yet
